messages.text: The spore-hound lunges out of the fungal murk and buries rows of soft, rotten teeth in you, and a puff of spore bursts from its jaws as it bites. The blow {verb} you!
The spore-hound snaps at you and you wrench clear as its jaws clash shut on a mouthful of drifting spore.
The spore-hound bears you down and worries at you, grinding its rotten teeth deep while its spores flood the wound! The blow {verb} you!
